title: mentha sylvestris subsp. dumortieri
intro: Mentha sylvestris subsp. dumortieri, also known as water mint or broad-leaved mint, is a subspecies of mint native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Mentha sylvestris subsp. dumortieri include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its ability to alleviate headaches and fever. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
